summary: Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed (patient, doctors, appointments incl. create + 404, prescriptions with filter, health tips, _id excluded). Frontend: Home screen loads with Pune location, avatar, welcome banner, specialties, MyDoc list and Health Tips carousel. Bottom tab bar shows 5 tabs and the center MyDocs tab renders as an elevated circular gradient FAB. Appointments tab shows Upcoming/Past segmented view with cards. MyDocs tab shows search + filter chips + 4 doctor cards. Doctor detail shows hero and Book Again CTA. Book Appointment screen renders 2 visit types, 14-day date strip, 8 time slots; selecting a slot and confirming shows the confirmation-modal with details and done button. Prescription tab shows 4 cards grouped by month with filter chips; detail screen shows diagnosis, medicines and advice. Profile tab shows Rahul Patil hero, stats (O+, 4 doctors, 6 visits), contact info card and options list. No red screens, no API failures, no critical bugs found.

issues: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Also props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Cosmetic only – app renders correctly.

action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents to remove RN Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly uses find({}, {'_id': 0}) everywhere so ObjectId is never leaked.
Frontend api.ts correctly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL and prefixes /api on every route.
All interactive elements carry testID props (home-screen, bottom-tab-bar, tab-*, doctor-card-*, book-again-btn, confirm-booking-btn, confirmation-modal, prescription-card-*).
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds MongoDB on startup (patient, 4 doctors, 6 appointments, 4 prescriptions, 3 health tips). One TEST_ appointment was created during POST test (persists but does not affect UI negatively).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 backend pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass. Frontend Playwright flow validated on mobile viewport 390x844 covering home, appointments, mydocs, doctor detail, book appointment (with time-<slot> selector and confirmation modal), prescription list & detail, profile. Time slot testID uses pattern time-<slot> (e.g. time-9:00 AM), not time-slot-*.
